task_completion.description: Verify that a daily chart for SPY is open in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a NinjaTrader chart window with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day') visible in the chart tab, title bar, or data series label in the top-left corner.

task_completion.description: Verify the right side margin is set to 250 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chart Properties dialog showing 'Right side margin' set to 250, OR observe a significantly large, empty blank space on the right side of the chart between the last price bar and the Y-axis.

task_completion.description: Verify the bar spacing is set to 15 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chart Properties dialog showing 'Bar spacing' set to 15, OR observe that the chart is highly zoomed in with unusually wide/thick candlesticks or bars.

task_completion.description: Verify the Y-axis scaling is set to 'Fixed' with a minimum of 350 and a maximum of 550.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Axis Properties dialog showing the scale mode set to 'Fixed' with Min = 350 and Max = 550, OR look at the Y-axis on the right side of the chart and confirm the visible scale explicitly starts at exactly 350 at the bottom and ends at exactly 550 at the top.

task_completion.description: Verify that vertical grid lines are disabled, leaving only horizontal lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chart Properties dialog where Vertical Grid Lines are set to hidden/transparent, OR look at the chart background and confirm there are horizontal grid lines visible but absolutely no vertical grid lines.

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace was saved to persist the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent interacting with the 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center and clicking 'Save', or a 'Save Workspace' dialog box being confirmed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent configured the chart using the NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with NinjaTrader menus, chart windows, and properties dialogs rather than editing XML configuration files in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the chart displays actual market data for SPY.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should display realistic candlestick or bar data for the SPY ETF, not an empty grid or a mocked image.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply type the success criteria into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should not show Notepad or a terminal echoing 'Right margin 250, Bar spacing 15, Fixed 350-550' as a substitute for actually configuring the software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 chart for SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). The agent must set the Y-axis to a Fixed scale from 350 to 550. Note that this is a subset viewing window for technical analysis, as the actual SPY data provided ranges from approximately $380 to $697. The VLM should verify the specific configuration values (Right margin: 250, Bar spacing: 15, Min: 350, Max: 550, Vertical grid lines: disabled) either in the NinjaTrader properties dialogs or visually reflected on the chart itself.
